creator: Sunrychen@gmail.com
text:
While trying to setup vpnd as client with slip mode, which is vpnd's 
default mode. Interface sl0 can't be configured up.

While /var/log/messages says:
-----------------------------------------------------------------
Dec  5 19:30:21 www vpnd[975]: version 1.1.2 (compression enabled) starting.
Dec  5 19:30:21 www vpnd[975]: slip link failed, setting the encapsulation or conf
iguring the interface failed, will retry in 10 seconds.
-----------------------------------------------------------------

It will try continuing, and fail all the time.

How-To-Repeat: Try to configure up vpnd as client with slip mode.
